overall.description: A high-speed drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves along a multi-lane road surrounded by towering buildings with neon lighting, transitioning from a dry enclosed corridor to a rain-slicked urban canyon with prominent digital billboards. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with cinematic quality.

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the covered corridor, a yellow taxi overtakes on the left. Palm trees become visible through the left glass structure as the environment begins to open up. The overhead circular lights continue to illuminate the dry road ahead.

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from the covered corridor to an open urban canyon. The road becomes wet and reflective as large digital billboards illuminate the right wall with bright neon advertisements. Palm trees line the left side as the camera speeds toward an overhead bridge structure.

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a wet neon-lit urban canyon with dense traffic. Multiple digital billboards tower on the right side displaying bright advertisements. A large truck passes on the left, temporarily obscuring the view, as the camera continues speeding through the rain-slicked futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey through a futuristic city that transforms from a dry, enclosed highway corridor into a rain-slicked urban canyon. It begins speeding forward under circular overhead lights with metallic walls on the right, as a futuristic sedan overtakes the camera on the left. As the camera continues, a yellow taxi passes by and palm trees become visible through a glass structure, signaling the environment's gradual opening. The scene then shifts from the covered corridor to an open cityscape where the asphalt becomes wet and reflective, while massive neon billboards ignite the right side of the road. Finally, the camera surges through dense traffic and under an overhead bridge, momentarily obscured by a passing truck as it plunges deeper into the neon-lit, rain-drenched urban canyon.
